ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Continued To Aug-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Continued To Aug-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. The will dated January 22, 2013 is admitted to probate. George T. Haymaker, III is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
